title: Newsletter BitAgora
description: Selezione articoli IA

title: How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing
description: See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale.

title: Introducing GPT-5.4
description: Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context.

title: Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations
description: OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments.

title: Scaling social science research
description: GABRIEL is a new open-source toolkit from OpenAI that uses GPT to turn qualitative text and images into quantitative data, helping social scientists analyze research at scale.

title: Testing ads in ChatGPT
description: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, with clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control.

title: Best-of-Tails: Bridging Optimism and Pessimism in Inference-Time Alignment
description:

title: LEAD: Breaking the No-Recovery Bottleneck in Long-Horizon Reasoning
description:
arXiv:2603.06870v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Long-horizon execution in Large Language Models (LLMs) remains unstable even when high-level strategies are provided. Evaluating on controlled algorithmic puzzles, we demonstrate that while decomposition is essential for stability, extreme decompositi

title: LieCraft: A Multi-Agent Framework for Evaluating Deceptive Capabilities in Language Models
description:
arXiv:2603.06874v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit impressive general-purpose capabilities but also introduce serious safety risks, particularly the potential for deception as models acquire increased agency and human oversight diminishes. In this work, we present

title: Animating Petascale Time-varying Data on Commodity Hardware with LLM-assisted Scripting
description:
arXiv:2603.07053v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Scientists face significant visualization challenges as time-varying datasets grow in speed and volume, often requiring specialized infrastructure and expertise to handle massive datasets. Petascale climate models generated in NASA laboratories requir

title: A Cortically Inspired Architecture for Modular Perceptual AI
description:
arXiv:2603.07295v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: This paper bridges neuroscience and artificial intelligence to propose a cortically inspired blueprint for modular perceptual AI. While current monolithic models such as GPT-4V achieve impressive performance, they often struggle to explicitly support

title: Interrupting and Adding Details in GPT-5.4 Thinking
description: In ChatGPT, GPT‑5.4 Thinking can now provide an upfront plan of its thinking, so you can adjust course mid-response while it’s working, and arrive at a final output that’s more closely aligned with what you need without additional turns.

title: Computer Use & Frontend UI with GPT-5.4 Thinking
description: OpenAI researcher SQ Mah explains how GPT-5.4 Thinking brings even more powerful capabilities to Codex — with more persistent computer-use (CUA) capabilities that cut token usage by two-thirds in some cases, and stronger image understanding for seamless website UI and image generation.

title: Improving Web Search Results in GPT-5.3 Instant
description: OpenAI researcher Josh McGrath explains how GPT-5.3 Instant’s responses when using web search are more contextual, relevant, and stylistically natural.

title: Reducing Overcaveating in GPT-5.3 Instant
description: OpenAI researcher Blair Chen explains how GPT-5.3 Instant reduces unnecessary disclaimers, making ChatGPT more directly helpful and smoother to use.
